mapper.select:
SELECT r.reservation_id, r.num_people, r.total_price, r.status, r.reserved_at,
s.start_time, s.end_time,
pr.program_id, pr.title, pr.thumb,
w.workshop_id FROM reservation AS r LEFT JOIN schedule AS s ON r.schedule_id = s.schedule_id LEFT JOIN program AS pr ON s.program_id = pr.program_id LEFT JOIN workshop AS w ON pr.workshop_id = w.workshop_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.reserved_at DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.num_people, r.total_price, r.status, r.reserved_at,
s.schedule_id, s.start_time, s.end_time,
pr.program_id, pr.title, pr.price, pr.thumb,
u.user_id, u.name, u.email, u.phone,
w.workshop_id, w.address,
p.payment_id, p.method, p.status AS paymentStatus, p.paid_at FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN schedule s ON r.schedule_id = s.schedule_id LEFT JOIN program pr ON s.program_id = pr.program_id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN workshop w ON pr.workshop_id = w.workshop_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON r.reservation_id = p.reservation_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation(schedule_id, user_id, num_people, total_price) VALUES(#{scheduleId}, #{userId}, #{numPeople}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id FROM reservation r JOIN payment p ON p.reservation_id = r.reservation_id JOIN schedule s ON s.schedule_id = r.schedule_id WHERE r.status = '확정' AND p.status = '완료' AND s.start_time <= NOW() AND s.end_time <= NOW()
mapper.update:
UPDATE reservation SET status = '수강종료' WHERE reservation_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE status="수강종료" AND profit_paid = false
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET profit_paid = true WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}

UPDATE reservation SET status = '취소' WHERE status = '대기' AND schedule_id IN
#{id}
